text.title: Use Case Modeling Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes the BA from use-case-state signal to the active rule.

decision-tree.root-question: primary_actor names a specific role with scope?

conclusion.verdict: resolve actor with role+scope from glossary

branch.when: primary_actor.token_count >= 2 AND goal.contains(' AND ') OR main_success_scenario.length > 10

conclusion.verdict: split use case into multiple goals

branch.when: primary_actor.token_count >= 2 AND goal_single == true AND prose_condition_count > 0
primary_actor.token_count >= 2 AND goal_single == true AND prose_condition_count == 0 AND alt_count == 0 OR exception_count == 0
primary_actor.token_count >= 2 AND goal_single == true AND prose_condition_count == 0 AND alt_count >= 1 AND exception_count >= 1 AND trace_id_empty == true
primary_actor.token_count >= 2 AND goal_single == true AND prose_condition_count == 0 AND alt_count >= 1 AND exception_count >= 1 AND trace_id_empty == false

conclusion.verdict: validate set + hand off to AC team
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: Authenticated Patient → single goal → predicate conditions → alt+exception both ≥1 → trace_id=PROD-432 → hand off (r5).
